  • Welcome to Sandhya Farms

Sandhya Farms

Live With Nature

Escape the hustle and bustle of city life and retreat to our charming farmhouse, where tranquility meets comfort. Perfect for families, friends, and couples, our farmhouse offers an idyllic setting for relaxation and memorable moments.

Why Choose Us?

  • Serene Location: Nestled amidst lush greenery and picturesque landscapes.
  • Spacious Accommodations: Well-furnished rooms with modern amenities and rustic charm.
  • Private Pool: Take a refreshing dip and soak up the sun.
  • Outdoor Activities: Enjoy bonfires, nature walks, and recreational games.
  • Farm-to-Table Experience: Relish fresh, organic meals sourced directly from our farm.

Booking Options

  • Day Packages: Perfect for picnics and day outings.
  • Weekend Getaways: Relax, rejuvenate, and recharge.
  • Exclusive Events: Host intimate gatherings, birthdays, or anniversaries.

Special Amenities

  • Free Wi-Fi
  • Fully equipped kitchen
  • Barbecue facilities
  • Ample parking space

Book Online

Live With Nature

Escape the hustle and bustle of city life and retreat to our charming farmhouse, where tranquility meets comfort. Perfect for families, friends, and couples, our farmhouse offers an idyllic setting for relaxation and memorable moments.

Our Testimonials

What Others Say

Let’s have a look at our happy clients feedback.

Peaceful Retreat

“The Sandhya Farms was the perfect escape from the city! The quiet surroundings and beautiful views made our stay so relaxing. The property was well-maintained, and we loved the rustic charm of the decor. We’ll definitely be back!”
Akshay TuliDirector, Tuli Pharmaceutical International

Ideal for Families

“We stayed at this farmhouse for a family getaway, and it exceeded all our expectations. The kids loved playing outside, and we enjoyed cozy evenings by the fireplace. The hosts were incredibly welcoming, making us feel right at home!”
Arushi GautamCEO, Skyline Infrastructure

Stunning Location

“The farmhouse is in an absolutely gorgeous setting. Waking up to the sunrise over the fields was magical. It was the perfect blend of modern comfort and countryside charm. Highly recommend it to anyone looking for a tranquil vacation.”
Ashutosh SinhaCo-Founder, Tech World Builders

Few Words About Us

Welcome to Sandhya Farms, your perfect escape from the everyday hustle! Nestled in the serene and picturesque surroundings of Noida, our farmhouse is a sanctuary of tranquility, comfort, and joy. Whether you're planning a grand celebration, an intimate gathering, or simply looking for a peaceful getaway, Sandhya Farms offers the ideal space to create unforgettable memories.
